title: Rig Veda 10.191: Unity (The Last Hymn)
description: From the Rig Veda — the oldest scripture in any Indo-European language.
introduction: From the Rig Veda — the oldest scripture in any Indo-European language.

translation.text: Come together, speak together, let your minds be one. Common be your prayer, common your assembly. I make a common prayer for you.
